What We Offer

From quick city rides to long outstation trips, we have a service that fits your travel plan perfectly.

Local Ride

Affordable local rides within city limits with flexible timing

One Way Trip

Single destination travel without return charges

Round Trip

Book cab for round trip journeys with best pricing

Airport Transfer

Reliable airport pickup and drop service on time

How It Works

01
Choose Your Service

Select from local, one way, round trip, or airport transfer.

02
Pick Your Cab

Choose the vehicle that best fits your group size and budget.

03
Fill Booking Form

Enter your details and send a booking request via WhatsApp.

04
Confirmed & Travel

Get confirmation and enjoy your comfortable journey.

Book Now
Rana Travels

Your trusted cab partner for safe, reliable, and affordable travel. Available 24/7 for local rides, outstation trips, and airport transfers.
